title: Knight Tears Off the Queen
setup: Black's queen has parked one knight-leap away from the white knight, and there's nothing to recapture with.
hint: From {{d4}} the knight has eight squares to choose from — one of them ends the game.
explanation:
## The Idea

The knight on d4 reaches **b5** with a perfect L-shape jump (-2 files, +1 rank). The queen sits there alone:

- {{Nxb5}} — knight gobbles the queen.
- Material change: knight (3) for queen (9) = **+6**, decisive.

### How to spot it

1. After the opponent moves the queen, scan all eight knight squares around the new queen position.
2. If one of *your* knights stands on a knight-leap from the queen, you may have a tactic.
3. Verify the queen has no defender on that square.

Here the king on e8 is far away and there are no other Black pieces.

> The knight is the only piece that can attack a queen *without* being attacked back. That asymmetry is its superpower.
